posts.title: Customer Success: Training Centers Trust Easyly
posts.body:

posts.title: Technical Deep Dive: How Driving Simulators Work
posts.body:
Understanding Truck & Bus Simulator Technology

At Foshan Easyly (est. 2004), we engineer simulators that replicate real driving:

Motion Systems:
- 3DOF: Pitch, Roll, Yaw
- 6DOF: Full motion with Heave, Surge, Sway

Key Components:
- Professional-grade actuators
- Real-time control algorithms
- Multi-monitor display integration
- Custom-tuned motion profiles

Visit: https://www.studycar.com/en/

posts.title: Why Simulators Improve Training
posts.body:
Why Simulators Are the Future:

1. Safety First
- Zero risk during initial training
- Safe practice of emergency scenarios

2. Cost Effective
- 70-90% lower operational costs
- No fuel consumption

3. Unlimited Practice
- 24/7 availability
- No weather restrictions

4. Standardized Training
- Consistent training scenarios
- Measurable progress tracking

Data shows: simulators improve efficiency by 40-70%.

Visit: https://www.studycar.com/en/

#safetytraining 2026 #racing simulator #6dof #motionplatform
